rows.label: qev040101_MSG0001
rows.name: ...Ah, are you a BLADE-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Please-mo! I'll give you anything,
so please save Lana!
My sweet honey, Bubu's sweet honey-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev040101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for detailed circumstances.

rows.label: qev040101_JNK0020
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev040101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say you don't know the situation,
but refuse for now.

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0003
rows.name:
How cruel-mo!
But... you're going to listen to me without question-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0004
rows.name:
If it means getting help to save Lana,
I don't care about appearances-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0005
rows.name:
Lana is Bubu's wife... she's an angel-mo.
There's no Nopon as beautiful as her anywhere-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Ooh... such an angel went to
the Black Steel Continent to stock up on goods
and hasn't come back-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Bubu tried to stop her, saying a fragile
Nopon like Lana didn't need to go
to such a dangerous place-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0008
rows.name:
But Lana insisted she wanted to help Bubu
with his work and left-mo...
Isn't she admirable-mo? Doesn't it bring you to tears-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Ahh, what a wonderful Nopon she is-mo!
You're completely captivated by Lana's charm too, aren't you-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev040101_SEL0031
rows.name:
Harbor favorable feelings towards
the Nopon named Lana.

rows.label: qev040101_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev040101_SEL0041
rows.name: Say you don't have any particular interest.

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0010
rows.name:
I understand how you feel-mo...
But Lana belongs only to Bubu-mo.
You can't go getting any weird ideas-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0011
rows.name:
I can tell even if you try to hide your embarrassment-mo.
But Lana belongs only to Bubu-mo.
You can't go getting any weird ideas-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ahem... So, I want you to go to the
Black Steel Continent and check on Lana for me-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Bubu won't spare any reward for Lana's sake-mo.
So please, do whatever it takes
to save Bubu's angel-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Thank you-mo!
Please protect Lana's incredibly
cute and wonderful smile-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0015
rows.name:
If I knew this would happen, I should have
sent about 1000 BLADE escorts with her-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0016
rows.name:
Please-mo...
Bring Bubu's angel who went to the
Black Steel Continent back safely-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0017
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_JNK0050
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev040101_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask the silent Bubu what happened.

rows.label: qev040101_JNK0060
rows.name: Demand

rows.label: qev040101_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Bubu for a reward.

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0018
rows.name: Sorry-mo, we're in the middle of a marital quarrel right now-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Because Lana is being terrible-mo.
Even though Bubu was so worried,
she isn't reflecting on her actions at all-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0020
rows.name: Geez... I don't want to talk to her for a while-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Ah, this is your reward-mo.
Thank you so much for bringing her back-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Ah, sorry-mo.
I was so furious that I just forgot-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0023
rows.name: ...Mo? What am I so angry about, you ask-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Because Lana is being terrible-mo.
Even though Bubu was so worried,
she isn't reflecting on her actions at all-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0025
rows.name: Geez... I don't want to talk to her for a while-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0026
rows.name:
I properly prepared your reward-mo.
I want you to accept this-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Because I haven't been with Lana for so long,
my body has started shivering and shaking-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0028
rows.name:
Ahh... What happened to Bubu's angel...
to Lana-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_JNK0070
rows.name: Honest

rows.label: qev040101_SEL0071
rows.name: Tell him the truth as it is.

rows.label: qev040101_JNK0080
rows.name: Vague

rows.label: qev040101_SEL0081
rows.name:
Tell him only that Lana
is not coming back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Eeeeeh!?
She made a child with Walolo
and is going to live on the Black Steel Continent-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Wh... why-mo...
Was it bad that I worried about Lana's health
and didn't feed her a lot of meat-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0031
rows.name:
She's not coming back...
Why-mo, what is she dissatisfied with about Bubu-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0032
rows.name:
Was it bad that I worried about Lana's health
and didn't feed her a lot of meat-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0033
rows.name:
If she had just said so, I would have given Lana
anything she wanted at any time-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0034
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040101_MSG0035
rows.name:
Sorry-mo... Please leave me alone for a bit-mo.
Um, this is your reward-mo.[ST:wait ]
